description: A nocturnal urban scene showing a wet cobblestone street lined with Victorian brick buildings, illuminated by gas street lamps that create warm pools of light against the dark facades. The moon glows through thin clouds in the upper left. A church spire rises in the distant background at left. The wet pavement reflects the lamplight and moonlight in gleaming streaks. The scene is largely deserted, creating a mood of quiet solitude. The buildings feature arched windows and architectural details typical of 19th-century English architecture.
